2603.23420.title: Bilevel Autoresearch: Meta-Autoresearching Itself
2603.23420.paper_summary: If autoresearch is itself a form of research, then autoresearch can be applied to research itself. We take this idea literally: we use an autoresearch loop to optimize the autoresearch loop. Every existing autoresearch system -- from Karpathy's single-track loop to AutoResearchClaw's multi-batch extension and EvoScientist's persistent memory -- was improved by a human who read the code, identified a bottleneck, and wrote new code. We ask whether an LLM can do the same, autonomously. We present Bilevel Autoresearch, a bilevel framework where an outer loop meta-optimizes the inner autoresearch loop by generating and injecting new search mechanisms as Python code at runtime. The inner loop optimizes the task; the outer loop optimizes how the inner loop searches. Both loops use the same LLM -- no stronger model is needed at the meta level. On Karpathy's GPT pretraining benchmark, the meta-autoresearch outer loop achieves a 5x improvement over the standard inner loop alone (-0.045 vs. -0.009 val_bpb), while parameter-level adjustment without mechanism change yields no reliable gain. The outer loop autonomously discovers mechanisms from combinatorial optimization, multi-armed bandits, and design of experiments -- without human specification of which domains to explore. These mechanisms succeed by breaking the inner loop's deterministic search patterns, forcing exploration of directions the LLM's priors systematically avoid. The core principle is simple: if autoresearch can meta-autoresearch itself, it can, in principle, meta-autoresearch anything with a measurable objective.
2603.23420.paper_summary_zh: 如果自我研究本身是一種研究，那麼自我研究可以應用於研究本身。<lb/>我們字面上理解這個想法：我們使用自我研究循環來優化自我研究循環。<lb/>每個現有的自我研究系統——從 Karpathy 的單軌循環到 AutoResearchClaw 的多批次擴展和 EvoScientist 的持久記憶——都是由一個閱讀代碼、識別瓶頸並編寫新代碼的人類改進的。<lb/>我們詢問一個 LLM 是否可以自動執行相同的操作。<lb/>我們提出了雙層自我研究，這是一個雙層框架，其中外部循環通過在運行時生成和注入新的搜索機制作為 Python 代碼來對內部自我研究循環進行元優化。<lb/>內部循環優化任務；外部循環優化內部循環的搜索方式。<lb/>兩個循環使用相同的 LLM——在元層面不需要更強的模型。<lb/>在 Karpathy 的 GPT 預訓練基準上，元自我研究外部循環相比於標準內部循環單獨實現了 5 倍的改進（-0.045 對 -0.009 val_bpb），而沒有機制變更的參數級調整則沒有可靠的增益。<lb/>外部循環自動發現來自組合優化、多臂賭徒和實驗設計的機制——無需人類指定要探索的領域。<lb/>這些機制通過打破內部循環的確定性搜索模式而成功，強迫探索 LLM 的先驗系統性避免的方向。<lb/>核心原則很簡單：如果自我研究可以元自我研究自身，那麼原則上，它可以元自我研究任何具有可測量目標的事物。
2603.23420.author: Yaonan Qu et.al.
